m_26_14.description: Adds the geo_point 'location' coordinate to source/destination on network flow docs (logs-network_traffic.flow-*) so the Security Network map renders. Geoips into a temp field and copies ONLY .location into src/dst geo, so any pre-existing destination.geo.country_iso_code / country_name enrichment (consumed by the network_traffic_to_rare_country ML job) is preserved -- the country fields are NOT re-derived, avoiding GeoLite2-version drift across reseeds. Private/reserved source IPs do not resolve and are silently skipped (ignore_missing). Idempotent.

description: M-26-14 WS5: geo_point location for network flow src/dst (location-only merge; preserves existing country fields).
